Dear OB,

 I am writing to inform you that I have decided to resign from my position as a co-educator at Our beginning. My last day of work will be 09/29/2023. 
The reasons of resigning of my job are:
1, I’m experiencing work abuse everyday, Viola kicks and hits me everyday, work abuse is not accepteble, and I have to aviod her hitting others all the time. When other parents were questioning what did you as a teacher do when she was hitting their kids I felt guilty and hopeless.
2, As a teacher, I don’t feel I get enough support, break is irregular, when I really need to go to the bathroom I can’t really find anyone to help.
Thank you for the opportunity to work in this position for the past 3 months!

Rachel Guo
check grammar

Dear OB,

I am writing to inform you that I have decided to resign from my position as a co-educator at Our Beginning. My last day of work will be 09/29/2023. 

The reasons for resigning from my job are:

1. I am experiencing work abuse every day. Viola kicks and hits me regularly, and this form of abuse is not acceptable. Additionally, I have to constantly prevent her from hitting others. When other parents question me about what I, as a teacher, did when she was hitting their children, I feel guilty and hopeless.

2. As a teacher, I do not feel that I receive enough support. Breaks are irregular, and when I desperately need to use the bathroom, I struggle to find someone to help cover for me.

Thank you for the opportunity to work in this position for the past 3 months.

Sincerely,

<PRESIDIO_ANONYMIZED_PERSON>

As a preschool teacher, I facilitated engaging and interactive activities for an average of 16 students ranging from 3-5 years old. I placed a high emphasis on documenting each child's learning processes and tracking their individual needs. Additionally, I maintained regular communication with parents, sharing classwork and lesson plans, in order to encourage the integration of learning at home.

I also utilized positive reinforcement techniques to motivate students and encourage their improved performance.

Communicate classwork and lesson plans with parents to encourage incorporating instruction at home.
Encouraged students improved performance through positive reinforcement techniques. rewrite my resume

As a preschool teacher, I successfully delivered creative and interactive activities to a diverse group of 16 students aged 3-5 years old. Recognizing the importance of individualized education, I placed a strong emphasis on documenting each child's learning processes and closely tracking their unique needs.

To foster a collaborative learning environment, I consistently communicated with parents, providing them with detailed information about classwork and lesson plans. This encouraged them to actively incorporate instruction at home, further enhancing their child's educational experience.

Furthermore, I fostered a positive and encouraging atmosphere in the classroom by implementing effective positive reinforcement techniques. By acknowledging and celebrating students' achievements, I motivated them to strive for continuous improvement, resulting in noticeable advancements in their performance.

Overall, my commitment to delivering engaging activities, individualizing instruction, maintaining open communication with parents, and utilizing positive reinforcement techniques has allowed me to effectively contribute to the growth and development of my students as a preschool teacher.

Delivered creative and interactive activities to an average of 16 students
between 3-5 years of age
Prioritize documenting children’s learning processes and tracking their individual needs
Communicate classwork and lesson plans with parents to encourage incorporating instruction at home.
Encouraged students improved performance through positive reinforcement techniques.   write similar content

As a dedicated preschool teacher, I consistently delivered creative and interactive activities to a diverse group of 16 students aged 3-5 years old. By incorporating engaging elements into lessons, I created a stimulating environment that inspired curiosity and fostered a love for learning.

Recognizing the importance of individualized education, I made it a priority to document each child's learning processes and track their individual needs. This allowed me to tailor my teaching approach to each student, ensuring their growth and development was nurtured effectively.

In order to establish strong partnerships with parents, I maintained regular and open communication. By sharing detailed classwork and lesson plans, I encouraged parents to actively participate in their child's education at home. This collaborative approach helped reinforce the concepts learned in the classroom and promoted a seamless transition between school and home.

Moreover, I firmly believe in the power of positive reinforcement. By focusing on celebrating achievements and providing constructive feedback, I fostered a supportive classroom environment that encouraged students to strive for excellence. This approach not only boosted their self-confidence but also led to improved performance and a genuine enthusiasm for learning.

As a result of my commitment to delivering engaging activities, documenting progress, maintaining open communication with parents, and utilizing positive reinforcement techniques, I have been able to make a meaningful impact on the educational journey of my students as a preschool teacher.

change rtf into word format at mac

To convert an RTF file to Word format on a Mac, you can follow these steps:

1. Open the RTF file you wish to convert in TextEdit or any other compatible text editor.
2. Click on "File" in the menu bar at the top of the screen.
3. Select "Save As" from the drop-down menu.
4. In the saving window, choose a location to save the file and enter a name for the converted file.
5. In the "Format" dropdown menu, select "Word Document (.docx)".
6. Click on the "Save" button.

The RTF file will now be saved in Word format (docx) on your Mac. You can open and edit the converted file using Microsoft Word or other word processing software that supports the docx format.
